title: Part 7 – Passage unique : notice de rappel de produit
instructions: Lisez la notice, puis répondez aux questions.
passage:
PRODUCT RECALL NOTICE
Product: EasyCook Electric Kettle, Model EC-500
Date: October 12th

Northfield Appliances is issuing a voluntary recall of the EasyCook Electric Kettle (Model EC-500) purchased between January and August of this year.

Reason for recall: In rare cases, the automatic shut-off feature may not function correctly, which could pose a risk of overheating.

What to do: Stop using the product immediately. Visit our website at www.northfieldappliances.com/recall or call our customer service line at 1-800-555-0192 to register for a full refund or a free replacement unit.

Customers do not need to return the product before receiving their replacement. A prepaid mailing label will be sent to registered customers within 10 business days.

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

questions.prompt: Why is the product being recalled?
choices: The shut-off feature may not work correctly
It was recalled by the government
questions.explanation: "the automatic shut-off feature may not function correctly, which could pose a risk of overheating".

questions.prompt: What will customers receive after registering?
choices: A full refund or a free replacement
questions.explanation: "register for a full refund or a free replacement unit".

questions.prompt: When will the prepaid mailing label be sent?
questions.explanation: "A prepaid mailing label will be sent to registered customers within 10 business days".
